---
name: Good First Issue
about: A well-scoped task for first-time or beginner contributors.
title: "[GOOD FIRST ISSUE] - <Brief Description>"
assignees: ''
---

## What Needs to Be Done
<!-- Provide a clear description of the exact task. -->
Clear description of the task.

## Why This Matters
<!-- Explain how this fits into the larger SuperBrowser system. -->
How this fits into the larger project or improves the user experience.

## Files to Look At
<!-- Point the contributor to the exact files or directories relevant to this project. -->
- `frontend/src/` — React components, styles, or context management code
- `backend/` — FastAPI endpoint routers, service logic, or web scrapers
- `backend/main.py` — The primary FastAPI server setup file

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- What must be completed for this issue to be closed? -->
- [ ] Feature or fix works exactly as intended without breaking existing per-tab context.
- [ ] The code follows clean standards and handles errors safely (e.g., fallback scrapers).
- [ ] Code changes are verified and ready to be linked to a incoming PR.

## Tech Context
<!-- Any relevant background: which API endpoints to hit, UI files to modify, or dependencies to track. -->
Any relevant background about SuperBrowser's architecture that will help a beginner get started quickly.

## Mentorship
Comment on this issue with your interest and it will be assigned to you according to GSSoC guidelines. The maintainer will guide you through your first PR.
